What Others Are Saying About Us

Luke Bowler, road rider and new father. Listen to his bike fit story.

book a fit

Ride Pain Free

There is no reason to ride in discomfort. Saddle sores do not need to tolerated. Knee pain is not ‘normal’. Cyclist are great at suffering… but are you suffering unnecessarily? Let us help you resolve you aches and pains before they turn into injuries.

find out more

Be The Best You Can Be

Do you know if your bike position is holding back your performance? If you are looking to achieve what you know you can, leave no stone unturned. We can help you understand your physiology, improve your weaknesses and leverage your strengths. Don’t leave watts on the table!

find out more

Buy The Right Size Bike

If you are looking to invest a tidy sum into a new bike, make sure it is the right bike for you! Our sizing service will provide you will all the knowledge, guidance and understanding to make the smart buying decisions. Don’t spend thousands of £££ based on guesswork.

find out more

Take It To The Next Level

Bike fitting is just the beginning of the journey. We partner with the best coaches, strength & conditioning, physios, osteopaths and health practitioners to bring a multi-disciplinary team to your finger tips. The bike is only 50% of the equation. The other half is the engine – YOU!

“The bike fit was absolutely fantastic! I would recommend it whether you are a novice or expert. I only wish I had done it years ago when I first started out!”

– Kate Youngman

Book a fit

Why We Are Different

Free Follow-Ups

Every rider that has a full fit with us is automatically entitled to a free follow-up session to ensure that their position actually works after extended testing

A Partnership

Our personalised ‘partnership’ approach gives you the knowledge and guidance needed to completely transform your riding experience in just a few hours.

Real World Testing

Immediate real world testing, on and off-road, with access to the Velopark’s specially built race circuit and trails. No one else in the country can offer this experience.

Completely Impartial

We do not sell bikes, or have any obligations to any brands. This means we can provide you with 100% un-biased, whole-of-the-market, bike purchasing info.

Access Our Library of 100+ Saddles

If you’re still struggling with saddle sores, numbness, chaffing or just don’t know what a good saddle should feel like – we can definitely help! Check out our dedicated saddle testing service.

find out more

We Welcome Riders Of Any Level

As your trusted advisor, we will give you the insight and guidance you need to get the best results from your bike – no matter what your experience, ability or starting point.

find out more

“The best £££ I’ve ever spent on my bike… The cumulative effect was enormous. It felt like cycling away on a different bike!”

– Stephen Patrick

Book a fit

So What’s Included?

  • Thorough understanding of your history, goals and aspirations
  • In depth on and off-bike movement assessment
  • Cleat positioning, insoles and wedges
  • Shimming for leg length discrepancies
  • Dynamic jig fitting
  • 3D video analysis & inertia sensor data options
  • Extensive saddle testing
  • Real world outdoor testing
  • Changes made to your bike on the day (if possible)
  • In depth written report
  • Personal Google Drive folder
  • CAD measurements
  • TT & aerobar testing
  • Free Follow-up session
  • Multiple London locations
  • Life time discounted rates for existing customers
book a fit

FIND OUT MORE

We Are Supporters Of The Ultra Distance Scholarship

The Ultra Distance Scholarship (UDS) was created in 2020 to help bring more diversity to the startline of a very niche and predominantly white sport; ultra distance cycling.

The UDS is a registered nonprofit and supports riders in a myriad of ways over the course of a year, in a training journey towards a prominent ultra cycling race.

We are super grateful to have been involved with the scholarship from the very beginning. We’ve fitted and designed the scholars’ custom geometry bikes each year, as well as providing them on-going support as they have trained for the most challenging ride to date.

Looking forward to the next one, onwards!

What’s the Real Value Of A Bike Fit?

Tabs talks to us about the support he got from us as an Ultra distance Scholar and how bike fitting helped him achieve a level of riding he never thought possible.

“…It transformed my riding experience – and that was just the beginning! Excellent bike fit in London that taught me a lot about cycling, the right bike for me, and set me up well to find a new bike… wonderful work.”

– Saleem Vaillancourt

book a fit

Locations

WEST: Cycling Performance UK

COMING SOON!
We have partnered up with Chris at Cycling Performance UK to offer you a body focused bike fitting, S&C, coaching & biomechanical expertise.

CENTRAL: Bespoke Cycling

We are very excited to be able to offer world class bike fitting in our central London studio based at Bespoke Cycling. Bespoke Cycling is an independent, staff owned, high-end bike studio.

  • Bespoke Cycling
    Laystall House
    8 Rosebery Avenue
    London

NORTH: Silverstone Wind Tunnel

We have a new base at Silverstone Sports Engineering Hub offering a technology driven bike fit studio with saddle pressure mapping, 3D motion capture, wind tunnel & efficiency rig testing…

  • Silverstone Park, Unit 1129
    Buckingham Rd

Do I Really Need A Bike Fit?

YES! Every rider can benefit from a bike fit.
But if you’re unsure what you need or which service would work best for you…
Talk to us, we’re always happy to chat!

FOUNDATION Bike Fit
5.0
Based on 345 reviews
powered by Google
review us on
Alexander Hyett
22:23 09 Mar 25
Absolutely great experience with FOUNDATION Bike Fit. Process was very enjoyable and the team were great at explaining all the detail.I had never had a bike fit before but would throughly recommend.
Mike Loriggio
19:34 08 Mar 25
I waited to review Foundation until I had completed a few rides after my bike fit.Matthew initially confirmed that my bike was the right size and that my fit wasn’t too far off. However, I had been struggling with saddle numbness, calf cramps and neck and wrist pain on longer rides.The entire fitting process was a great experience with careful adjustments made to my bike. The only hardware I needed was a slimmer handlebar - there was no upselling, just honest advice throughout.I’m genuinely amazed at the difference this fit has made. All of my previous discomforts are completely gone and I can now ride longer and stronger in total comfort.I can’t thank Matthew enough and highly recommend Foundation!
Pino Ruocco
11:40 04 Mar 25
Foundation Bike Fit offers an exceptional service that has significantly enhanced my cycling experience. From the moment I arrived at their state-of-the-art studio located within the iconic Lee Valley Velopark, I was impressed by their professionalism and attention to detail.The fitting session began with an in-depth consultation where Mat took the time to understand my cycling history, goals, and any discomforts I had been experiencing. Their comprehensive approach included assessing my flexibility, strength, and riding style to tailor the bike fit precisely to my needs.Throughout the process, they explained each adjustment, ensuring I understood the rationale behind every change. Their expertise was evident as they fine-tuned my bike's setup, addressing issues I hadn't even realized were affecting my performance.One of the standout aspects of Foundation Bike Fit is their commitment to education. They offer workshops like 'Bike Fitting Decoded' to empower cyclists with the knowledge to make informed decisions about their fit. This dedication to demystifying the bike fitting process sets them apart from others in the industry.Since my fitting, I've noticed a remarkable improvement in comfort and efficiency on the bike. The personalized adjustments have alleviated previous discomforts, allowing me to enjoy longer rides without issues. The comprehensive fit report provided after the session has been an invaluable resource for maintaining my optimal riding position.For anyone serious about enhancing their cycling performance and comfort, I highly recommend Foundation Bike Fit. Their expertise, personalized approach, and commitment to rider education make them a top choice for bike fitting services.
Matt Ahmadi
11:27 03 Mar 25
I have seen and done other bike fits in the past and they just don't come close to these guys. Their philosophy and approach is second to none. Matt's attention to detail, care and knowledge was fantastic. Lastly they are just a really nice bunch, sort of people you could go to the pub/ride with
Guillermo Castro
20:19 25 Feb 25
Finally went for a proper bike fit to help me with my long distance events and training. Extremely happy with the service from Foundation. Matthew was extremely thorough and made adjustments to get me more comfortable for long distances and take pressure off my hands. He also has provided the specs for my custom geometry bike frame I'm soon to order. Will definitely be back for a follow up fit.Highly recommended!
Charlie Watson
10:12 17 Feb 25
Brilliant bike fit. Bike feels 10x better. Real experts and extremely accommodating
Nicholas Edwards
09:42 17 Feb 25
You won't regret coming here. Friendly, great service and great advice for those who are starting out. Like me!
Deepraj Puri
21:21 16 Feb 25
I am a new cyclist and came to get a fit before you buy session, this started with a chat about my goals and current riding experience. Matt was really friendly and explained everything clearly.The session included a look at how I rode at the moment with videos from many angles. My current bike was laser scanned and setup correctly for my needs. They also have a great jig that allows for any adjustments and can set it up to mimic any style of bike.We also went over important aspects of balance and strength and things I can do off the bike to improve my riding. In addition they have a large selection of shoes and saddles and allowed me to try on proper cycling shoes to show how to setup cleats correctly for my needs.The report was very thorough and I was able to send it directly to the bike manufacturers to setup my new bike exactly as needed. I also got useful information on how I can improve posture on the bike and in general.Would highly recommend
Sam Iam
13:00 13 Feb 25
This was my first ever bike fit, so i wasn't sure what to expect. Wei talked me through the whole process and made the fit effortless. It was a really great experience. I learnt a lot and had a load of questions that Wei answered. It helped me to figure out what bike i want to purchase as my first road bike. Before the appointment with Wei i was really unsure of what to purchase. But now i'm very confident with the purchase that i've made. I would highly recommend anyone looking to enter road bike riding to get a bike fit done with Wei and the team!
K L
15:53 09 Feb 25
I did a "fit before you buy" fit with Mat. I haven't suffered from any pains, niggles or injuries from cycling but felt the bike fit would be essential ahead of upgrading. The result exceeded my expectations. I've learned more in those 4 hours than through countless physiotherapy appts or literature/content consumed in preceding years. And the appointment itself is merely tip of the value obtained as the report received afterwards with measurements and advice is and will be extremely helpful for years to come.My recommendation is - any bike owner would benefit from a bike fit, as identifying more optimal "fit" not only prevents any potential niggles but also helps in optimising performance which ultimately means more power with less effort and greater comfort.
Adrian Maidman
08:23 04 Feb 25
Booked the basic fit to resolve my persistent knee pain. I knew I was clueless but I had no idea there were so many elements that have to be taken into consideration to feel comfortable on the bike.Overall I had an amazing experience and consider this session VITAL to get into cycling without injury and to get the most out of your bike.The folks there are kind, attentive, and very helpful. The session was extremely comprehensive and results in pages and pages of useful data. It was a lot more than I expected and am thrilled that I can ride without pain.
Ed Simpson
16:29 02 Feb 25
I had a "refresher" bike fit in Jan 2025, about four years after buying my bike. I'm doing a different kind of riding now (ultra distance and multi-day) and I'm sure my flexibility has changed.I spent a fascinating two hours with Mat. He examined all the contact points systematically, videoing, tweaking, testing and retesting until my fit was properly dialled in.I was surprised at how much it changed, and how much stronger I feel pedalling (the results were plainly visible on video).Mat is incredibly thorough and knowledgeable, explains everything really clearly, and he's good company to boot.Highly recommended!
Rehana Ali-Rahman
13:08 29 Jan 25
I was not sure if anyone could help me with some unique challenges I was having, particularly associated with my hypermobility. Wei and the team are very giving with their time. Wei took his time to understand my riding goals, the issues I was having and was happy to help educate me so I can be more self-sufficient going forward. I would thoroughly recommend the Foundation Fit Bike Fit. It's made a huge difference to my comfort and performance on the bike.
Atiba Quildan
13:13 08 Jan 25
If you looking for what works for you then don't hesitate on booking a fit with Foundation. They have good philosophy on fitting. So they go what works with the individual and how they feel compared a system where you told this is what you should and be riding and this is why xy&z are happening. This what fitting is all about. Everyone is different so this approach make a lot of sense.I had a bad experence elsewhere and came to them. They are very open minded fit wise and I only wish I saw them sooner Fitting is a process but after my fit I feel like I am in a better place.
Andrew Davies
12:32 20 Dec 24
Great fit session with Wei, fantastic opportunity to try different positions and options and Wei's experience with the trade-offs between different set-ups was invaluable. An enjoyable and productive session with good follow up details and advice. Highly recommended.
Michele Moore Duhen
09:39 18 Dec 24
This is the 2nd fitting Wei has done for me and I cannot recommend him enough. He fitted me for my first bike in 2020 and I've ridden it for nearly 4 years with no issues. Now that I'm ready to upgrade I knew Wei was the only person to see to get measured for a new bike. I really appreciate that he spends the time to work with you and tweaks everything - saddle height, crank length, bars, stems, shoes, cleat position - you name it, Wei addresses it. We were able to look back at my original fit and how far I've come as a rider, and now look at bikes that will fit my new position and will allow me to continue growing as a rider and get more aero. Based on my fit, I've been able to purchase the right bike for me that will carry me into triathlon training and racing in 2025 and beyond. And even better is that once that new bike arrives, I can come back to see Wei to make any final adjustments before I'm out on the road - and that's included in the original price of the fitting.Get in to see Wei as soon as you can - you definitely won't regret it.
matt pointon
10:54 15 Dec 24
What a great service! Mat’s knowledge and level of detail is second to none and all explained in a way that’s easy to understand and relatable. Look forward to continuing working with Mat and Wei and seeing the gains. Cheers chaps 👍
Nick King
09:55 08 Dec 24
I recently had a TT bike fit at Foundation Fit with Matt, and it was nothing short of exceptional. The session covered every aspect of a bike fit in impressive detail – from assessing foot size and cleat position to finding the perfect saddle and determining the optimum crank length (5mm shorter than I started with!).Matt’s expertise and meticulous approach made the entire process both informative and enjoyable. The personalised CAD drawings he provided were incredibly helpful, outlining the bikes best suited for me and detailing the specific setup I’d need for each one. This level of clarity and precision gave me complete confidence in my decisions.The experience felt relaxed and unhurried, with all my questions answered thoroughly. Matt’s support extended well beyond the fit itself; he was on hand to assist with final queries before I ordered my new Quintana Roo TT bike. I’m already looking forward to returning to Lea Valley to fine-tune my position once the bike arrives!I can’t recommend Foundation Fit highly enough. If you’re investing in a new bike, don’t make a move without seeing these guys first – it’s a game-changer.
Ben Murray
15:18 05 Dec 24
Great service, well worth the spend. All the kinks on the bike ironed out.
Richard Barker
20:26 26 Nov 24
Wei and the team are great, insightful and easy to deal with when undergoing a fit and very responsive to email when I have any queries, an excellent service all round.
David Steel
11:38 24 Nov 24
I would absolutely recommend this service.The bike fit i had with Wei transformed my riding position from one who has had hip surgery and shifts around on a saddle to one that is planted in the saddle amazing transformation.Thank you so much.
Dan Williams
10:38 20 Nov 24
I had a fantastic experience with Foundation. It was the best and most comprehensive bit fit I've had. I left in a better position, knowing why Im getting pain because I have issues (the why is important) and some off bike work to hopefully improve. A huge thanks to Wei, Matt, Matt and Ev for their time and patience. I can't recommend them highly enough!
Darnyl Stanley
19:10 18 Nov 24
My first ever bike fit, so I didn't know what to expect, but I would say it was an amazing experience thanks to Mat. Mat made the experience relaxed all the while being professional.A few questions to start off with, then it was on the bike just to see where I was at. Mat answered all the questions I had clearly, so I understood the reason why certain changes were being made. Got onto the bike and started making slight changes to see how I felt riding and got to a point where I was far more comfortable than when I came in.We then got into doing some balance exercises. Mat made it clear that my balance and stability off the bike is just as important on the bike.Mat measured my feet and was advised to get better fitting cycling shoes, which will be my next purchase. Being a size 8 in shoes is not the same size 8 in cycling shoes 🤦🏾‍♂️. Mat also repositioned and changed my cleats, giving me more float.The report was way more than I expected. It was comprehensively written and included all the measurements, photos, and videos from the bike fit, along with all the suggested changes.I'm still adjusting to the ride position and trying to stop the bad habits I have managed to pick up, but I'm far better positioned on my bike since the bike fit with Mat.I highly recommend Foundation Bike Fit to anyone. Do not think that because you're an amateur cyclist, you don't need a professional bike fit. It's for amateur cyclists, too. Help prevent injury and be more comfortable on your bike, and in turn, cycling will be way more enjoyable. Getting a proper bike fit can save you so much more money and prevent you from spending money on a bike and then having to spend more money on components because your bike doesn't fit.100% recommended
Jared Rimmer
14:27 18 Nov 24
I bought my first road bike and decided to get a bike fit in order to ensure it was all set up correctly and to learn the basics from a professional. My bike fit was with Mat and he was incredible. After the adjustments it feels like a different bike and the pain and discomfort I was having before is gone. I would highly recommend Foundation Bike Fit.
Chun Hoi Lau
14:20 18 Nov 24
Super friendly and knowledgeable people. Were incredibly patient and even helped me fit a pair of cleats given I haven't worn them before!I would wholeheartedly recommend them for a "fit before you buy" session - especially if you are dropping a big purchase on a bike.
Steve Hutchings
08:35 17 Nov 24
I’ve been riding for about 8 years and this is my first proper bike fit and it was fantastic! Mat was brilliant and so thorough identifying things that I had not even considered! Comfort and fatigue were key areas to look at for me and the changes proposed have made such a difference. I also have some fitness and strength areas to work on which align with the changes made on the bike. A really enjoyable experience and highly recommended!
Tolly Coburn
18:13 12 Nov 24
Matt & Wei have been amazing, not only for their great fit knowledge but in the support they give beyond the fit, they've gone above and beyond. Getting up and running with first fit, recommending new bikes (and providing CAD drawings so the bike can be pre set up), to follow ups and further support. Can't recommend them enough for any rider. With Ev (Frequency Cycleworks) onsite too feels like you have a pro tour team behind you!
Chris Lunan
10:14 08 Nov 24
I would be giving a 6 star review if I could. Matt and the team from Foundation have been absolutely stellar.Amazing insights and information into both cycle setup and body composition. Great humour and even better puns!They have literally gone above and beyond to ensure that everything is right for me and allowed me soooo much testing time for me to really get settled in the saddle.Will deffo be going back and recommending to everyone who's suffering the same issues.
Dominic Barody
12:28 05 Nov 24
My second visit to Wei at Foundation Fit and my first at the Velodrome. Fantastic professional experience and well worth it. Did whole bike fit and shoes and have to say the results are great. Feel much better now on the new bike. Highly recommend, especially if you're spending good money buying a new bike it's vital to get the bike personally fitted, makes a big difference.
Teo Sakoulias
09:07 30 Oct 24
Best bike fit I 've ever had. Very professional, great attention to detail and both Mat and Wei are very friendly. Highly recommended
Eugene
08:46 14 Oct 24
I recently had a bike fit with Mat, and the experience was outstanding. I had countless questions about my body position and how it affects my performance, and he patiently answered each one, giving me a clearer understanding of how my body interacts with the bike. I really appreciated his attention to detail, patience and professionalism.The bike fit report exceeded my expectations - it was comprehensive and meticulously written, including all the necessary measurements, suggested component changes, and links to exercises that will help improve my power and endurance. I left with a much better awareness of what I need to work on.I also decided to invest in G8 insoles prior to the session, and while they’re not a total game changer, they’ve definitely improved the connection between my feet and the bike by providing better arch support. It was a worthwhile addition.I’m still adjusting to my new position, but I’m already sitting more square on the bike and my upper body feels noticeably more relaxed. While I’m yet to see the long term impact, I’m very happy with the progress so far.Overall, this experience was miles ahead of a previous bike fit I had with another reputable fitter. The difference in attention to detail and results is like night and day. I highly recommend Foundation Bike Fit to anyone serious about cycling or dealing with discomfort on the bike.
S S
08:39 05 Oct 24
My first ever experience of a professional bike fit.I was recommended to FBF by a club comrade and I can genuinely say I am grateful for that recommendation.Wei is very personable, with sound technical knowledge and a real passion for getting the right fit for you.The level of detail discussed was mind blowing and he thought of everything to check/test.I came away with a TT bike recommendation (which I will purchase shortly) and my current bike fit for purpose.The aftercare service is also impeccable and he and the team will do their utmost to ensure you have what you need.Really happy I did the Fit before you buy option, money well spent.Thank you!
Tim Cutting
21:39 04 Oct 24
This review has been along time coming. Just over a year ago I broke my left foot. The recovery wasn’t fast and my day to day life with 2 small kids and physical job wasn’t letting me get rest either. When I was finally aloud to jump back on the bike after around 12-14 weeks off it was like starting all over again. I started doing small rides (20-30km) and was fine, managed a few big rides (100-150km) that’s where I had issues. Anything over a hour and my feet and knees were ruined. I finally gave in and booked in with Wei and team. We had a detailed chat about why we are here and what’s happening. On & off the bike while we played with wedges, cleats and a few other bits. The whole Wei was very detailed in why and what we are trying. Once happy out in the sun I went for some laps round the velo park. Leaving with a massive smile and no more pain. Wei followed up with more than just a email with measurements. It was very detailed and with strengthening exercises as well. These guys go above and beyond to help you and their knowledge amazing. 6 months later and I have had very comfortable time on bike and no more numb feet. Thanks again guys
trevor simmons
16:02 04 Oct 24
Having ridden a bike for many a year I thought I had it nailed. However, as I have had a few more aches and pains I went for the full blown fit with Mat. Well it was quite clear that I didn’t know as much as I thought I did. Mat went from bottom to top understanding what was happening to me when I was riding my bike. He took videos of all this and explained to me what was going on and why I had these problems. The next step was to sit me on the jig and make changes to my position, posture, saddle position, cranks and bars. I found it amazing that my output went up for no apparent extra effort. We investigated different saddles and tried many until I could feel comfortable, efficient and confident. I have some personal homework to do to make some physical improvements. The adjustments to the bike were made and now I am excited to get out on the roads and see how this feels. I would like to thank Mat for his time and patience.Ev for fighting with my machine to ensure it is best possible condition for my future ventures.Can’t friggin wait….thanks ladsTrevor SimmonsAthletes Prepared By…La SantaTinajoLanzaroteSPAIN
Aiko Hashi
12:41 29 Sep 24
Tom Bigglestone
17:34 28 Sep 24
Highly recommend. Couldn’t fault at all - Mat was really keen to learn about me as a cyclist and do everything he could to help me achieve what I wanted from the session. Super impressed at everything in the session and afterwards too - with lots of really specific recommendations made for me. Reviews thus far aren’t wrong - the customer service really chimed with my own values not only as a customer but as a fellow small business director. If any doubt, I’d suggest just going for it. I was hesitant for a few months but then took the plunge and don’t regret it all. Thanks again Mat and the team, keep up the great work!
Dan Dunford
15:28 24 Sep 24
An absolute must, get booked in!Before spending out on a new bike, build into the budget a visit to these guys first.Often overlooked as it isn't a physical item but (as a coach myself) you will get more performance benefits from a comprehensive bike fit than spending the extra on your bike.As well as having the knowledge they are also super friendly and welcoming, definitely recommend.
Saki Thethy
20:39 20 Sep 24
Really helpful bike fit, made a huge difference.
Lindsay ibbott
17:18 19 Sep 24
This was the best experience! SO much more than I anticipated. Thoroughly worthwhile...just wish I'd done this years ago!! Had a road and TT bike fit in one session. Mat was so helpful - answering all my 'stupid' questions with a smile. I left feeling very positive and informed, with an extensive report to follow outlining everything we discussed. Highly recommend for anyone with any doubts about an existing bike or looking to buy their first bike or upgrade. Money well spent!
Paul Andrews
13:13 10 Sep 24
The guys at foundation are amazing! The new set up on my bike is a true transformation, night and day. I felt more at one with the bike, easier to transmit power and so much more comfortable.I cannot recomend them enough. I had a great time with the them and learnt a lot more about my riding style and bike.100% the best bike fit you'll get!
Lisa Watt
11:37 10 Sep 24
I can't recommend the guys at Foundation highly enough! Had a great session with Wei who took the time to understand my current riding goals, my existing bike position and how it could be adapted to be more comfortable and more efficient on the bike. A win win! The whole team is extremely knowledgeable and approachable. Everyone would benefit from visiting Foundation Fit, no matter what level of cyclist you are. A really valuable experience.
Andrew Davies
07:00 09 Sep 24
Was worried it was a little expensive for me but it was worth every penny! Very thorough bike fit and getting so much more enjoyment from my cycling. Went well over my time and have had follow ups too. They just want to make sure my bike is the right fit for me. Made such a difference.
Craig Muller
08:42 05 Sep 24
I had an amazing experience with Mat when I came in for my bike fit. He is incredibly knowledgable and patient and ticked all the boxes on what I was expecting for the day. He also spent a lot of time and effort putting everything together in an incredible report for me to take forward in my cycling journey I give the entire experience 10 stars out of 5
Rajesh Sidhu
19:29 02 Sep 24
I was recommended to have a bike fit by a colleague and I decided to give Foundation Fit a try, as they are local to me. I have had two bike fits by them to-date, and I have received an outstanding service all around on both occasions.The first bike fit was in August 2023 to fit a bike that I had already purchased based on the ‘recommended’ size online following a Cycle2Work purchase. Sadly, several months after my bike fit, that bike frame got damaged in an accident, so I was in the market for another one. Initially, I was just going to buy another bike to get fitted. I emailed Wei on the brand/model and he recommended against it with several reasons which he had picked out from comparing that bike to my previous bike fit. So, I took his advice in getting a bike fit done FIRST - in May 2024.Also, if I had followed the bike brands’ size measurements online, I’d be going for a size (or two) bigger than my bike fit analysis. This is because online size recommendations are generic on height only and don’t cater for things like your leg/torso height ratio, which did get picked up in my bike fits.Matt fitted me on both occasions. He was really friendly, welcoming and chilled. I sat down with Matt and we discussed the reason for my bike fit (triathlons), and we started to chat about my health and history of exercise and injuries. I could see his cogs turning in how he’d tailor the bike fit to me, and I noticed he paid careful attention to a few things I had mentioned. The fits can take at least a couple of hours depending on which you go for but honestly, that time flies. There is so much knowledge I picked up from Matt (and Wei on my second fit) about posture, positioning, good and bad habits and how to be effective and comfortable when I cycle. So much, that now I analyse others on their form and what they could improve.On my second fit, Matt remembered me and had already kitted their bike fitting bike to the dimensions of my first bike fit, and we went through every measurement again. He had even put the saddle I had purchased last year on it too to really bring back the original bike fit in its entirety. Matt was really patient throughout the fit. I never felt rushed or under pressure to give my opinion on my comfort of each measurement, including the saddle, and cleat positioning.After both bike fits, I was emailed a Fit Folder which contained images/videos of before-during-after the bike fit. It also included diagrams of my required dimensions on the bike which is mine to refer to on future bikes forever.Following my second bike fit, Matt and Wei identified a couple of brands/models which would be perfect for me. Foundation Fit are independent bike fitters so you’re sure to get an objective and independent view. I purchased the bike and brought it to Matt who fitted it out based on the bike fit. I was able to test it out on the open track at the velodrome and I felt more comfortable and faster than my first bike. This was a great post-sale service.I have had a few follow-up questions which I felt would be best sent to Foundation Fit. I emailed queries to Wei including discussions about TT bikes. He has been receptive and provided detailed responses to my queries – and all of that was post-service.If you’re after a really friendly and welcoming atmosphere filled with great experience, honest advice and lots of patience to get you at your best on your bike (or future bike) – you don’t need to look any further than Foundation Fit. However, I would recommend you approach them BEFORE you buy a bike! Don’t prioritise getting a fancy bike – prioritise getting one which your body will be comfortable on, which in turn will give you a far better performance on the road.Matt and Wei, thank you so much for all of your work – please keep up the excellent service. I look forward to working with you again, but hopefully not too soon...
Dave Oram
14:34 18 Aug 24
I went for the New Bike Fit. It was an experience I would repeat if I got a new bike and I will go back if I need a new pair of cycling shoes. It is a tiring day both mentally and physically, you are pedaling a lot of the time. Really felt at ease and chatting to Matt and Ed was like I was with old friends.So, what was so good about the Bike Fit. I learnt loads on the day, I got to see my road position in various setups; different crank lengths, different stem lengths, different bar lengths, different saddle height, different bar heights, etc. Matt described it well, it is like going to the Opticians and trying different lenses and finding out if it is better with the lens, better without or about the same. As the Bike Position is fine tuned, you can feel a difference and Matt with his expert musical ear can hear the difference too.The Fit starts off with your body, e.g. flexibility, movement. Cleat position is checked then moves onto the Bike. I learnt a lot about shoes, for example I had two pairs of size 42 shoes yet one pair was much longer so I need to look for shoe length and not the size in future. But I will no longer buy online, I will go to a Shop or Foundation to buy a shoe having checked it for fit before I buy.I now have shims fitted to my right foot and I now pedal so much more smoothly. Would never have spotted that without a Bike Fit.There is a wealth of data in the Bike Fit Report and it also provides example bikes on the market that will be a good fit for your body/position. The data in the Report will allow me to understand the key distances between contact points in the future when looking at new bikes and/or when adjusting my static setup and current bike.So was it worth the fee? Absolutely. Foundation do not sell bikes, they have no conflict of interest and are totally independent. I was after a Titanium bike and the model I wanted to buy having done a demo ride was actually a poor fit for me, partly due to the Infinity Saddle I use. I need a slacker Seat Tube angle. Would a Bike Fit at a Store which sells bikes come to the same conclusion and lose the sale?I had expected Foundation to tell me the Bike Frame size of the model I needed and the Stem Length/Angle. Turns out I need shorter Cranks and shorter handlebar width as well. Buying a Bike and finding this out later would have cost me far more than the cost of the Bike Fit.It is disappointing that the bike I wanted is not an optimum fit, but I could still proceed knowing that and knowing that specific components being fitted will work albeit limiting future adjustments if required. It is all about making an informed purchase, and I am well equipped to do that now after the Bike Fit.I decided having read the Bike Fit Report to approach one of the Titanium Bike Companies mentioned in the Report which actually can build a customised Frame Geometry to get an idea of cost, Foundation even provided a mock-up Frame Geometry based on that Companies Titanium Endurance Bike.Customer Service and After Sales Support is exceptional. Matt told me that before I do proceed with a purchase to check with him first so he can check it out on the CAD system to ensure it checks out. And once I have made my Bike purchase, Foundation will do a final fit on it to make sure it is setup according to their CAD drawing and one can ride it around the Velodrome track outside to check it out.With Bikes costing so much these days a Bike Fit is essential. I will end up with the right bike for me avoiding me unnecessary grief and expense finding solutions to the stock bike setup or worse finding out I need a different frame to meet my individual requirements.I have already benefitted on my current bike due to the shims and I have ordered a shorter stem (cheap and easy change) that will make the ride more comfortable.
Sue McMaster
18:06 14 Aug 24
Matt at Foundation Bike Fit was amazing. He really wanted to know what I wanted to get out of the session and took the time to listen and make adjustments to my bike to make it more comfortable and to allow me to put more power through he pedals. I’ve really noticed a difference since having the fit done and want to say a huge thank you to Matt. I’d highly recommend taking your bike along as having a proper fit makes such a huge difference. Thank you!
Sean Magner
13:29 08 Aug 24
Amanda Male
15:56 05 Aug 24
I found Foundation Bike Fit as I wanted to improve my aero position on my existing Giant Propel bike. Whilst it was comfortable for my sportive riding, I had recently taken up sprint and olympic distance triathlon and my original bike fit needed an update.They were extremely thorough and they found the bike did not ideally fit my long leg, short torso geometry and limited hip flexibility. My cleat position was moved backwards and they changed the crank length and saddle. Frustratingly, the Propel model also could not have tri bars mounted, as the only kit suitable were Giant's and they were out of stock everywhere!After a bit of thought, I contacted Wei and booked another fit to get guidance on what tri bike I could buy that would fit my geometry. He was very patient as someone new to bike language and specs. He provided three options, and kindly responded to my emails and questions, from others around me, and excitingly a new bike was chosen.I have had the bike set up by Ev and Wei only 12 days ago, and just completed my first Olympic distance race on it at the weekend. Whilst my bike power pedals did not function on the day (due to a software update), the ride was comfortable, I felt strong and stable and I have just qualified for the Olympic distance Age Group World Championships 2025.I would highly recommend Wei and his team to anyone looking to get improvements in their existing bike set up and guidance when purchasing a new bike. They have a wealth of knowledge, explain things really well, respond to emails quickly, and are brilliantly located at the Velo Park so you can try the bike on the track. They also have Ev in the workshop for all mechanical work. Thanks guys and see you for an update in the future!
James French
19:43 23 Jul 24
Can’t fault foundation. They’re really attentive, give you all the time you need and are only interested in finding the right bike and fit for you. I left the first fit with all the knowledge of how a bike should fit (turns out I didn’t know much) and the follow up report has been amazing for improving my strength and stability on the bike and also gave me all the information to buy exactly the bike I need and set it up perfectly.When I got the bike I used the drawing to set the bike up exactly as we ended the session. This meant the follow up session was super straightforward and focused as I’d spent a fair amount of time riding the right bike with the right setup before seeing foundation for the follow up. So the time was spent fine tuning rather than getting the bike setup as drawn and then not having spent any time riding in the new and improved position.Have heard stories of other bike fits and would recommend foundation 100%. The investment is without doubt worth it.
Peter Fletcher
10:58 23 Jul 24
Had an awesome injury prevention bike fit with Matt. He was really knowledgeable and took the time to get to know me and my aims/objectives on the bike.I left the bike fit with the knowledge of what was causing me discomfort on the bike and the tools to work on my bike form and posture going forward.I would recommend the team at foundation bike fit to anyone. It was honestly just a great few hours of learning and guidance.
Paul “PJ” Joyce
16:27 20 Jul 24
Thoroughly enjoyed my time at @fdn_bikefit getting a bike fit this morning. Wei and the chaps made me feel very welcome. Wei was excellent at explaining everything and answered every question I had and the coffee was good 👌🏻😀 Would recommend !!
Gavin Rolls
20:18 15 Jul 24
Charlotte Bell
11:40 10 Jul 24
Wei is an amazing bike fitter - my most comfortable fits have always been with Wei. He really listens and does a thorough analysis both on and off the bike helping to find what works for you and your body (not just what the numbers say). Not only that, but Wei and his team are all really knowledgeable, friendly and helpful. They go above and beyond!
michael reid
18:34 08 Jul 24
Great professional service. Went to see the last place I used three times with problems still unresolved. All sorted in one session with Foundation Fit. Thanks Wei.
Mikhail Rudoi
12:21 08 Jul 24
After I bought a bike I thought about a bike fit session from time to time. And it took me 4 (four) years before I booked one. I think it was a mistake that I did not do it earlier. I recommend everyone go to a bike fit session to avoid building wrong riding habits.Mat and the team are incredible professionals who gave me tons of advices and increased my bike knowledge.We updated a lot of technical parts from cleats to handlebar, but even more important we updated a few details in my position as well.
Caroline PE
09:38 30 Jun 24
As a newbie cyclist suffering from chronic neck and lower back pain, I can honestly say there is no better investment than a bike fit session with Wei at Foundation. I had my first session shortly after I bought my bike to get an understanding of the potential level of comfort and make sure the bike and parts were right for me. Went back for a follow-up 3 months later to fine tune a few things with a focus on posture adjustment. Wei is a good guy, super knowledgable and patient.
Jason
19:58 17 Jun 24
I had a great experience with Foundation Fit!Wei and the team were great help with optimising the bike to my riding position as well as identifying key areas to improve comfort such as shoes and cleat position.Very much recommend the team. I've already had a follow up session to discuss crank length, handle bar width and saddles.
Tariq Bayjoo
07:51 11 Jun 24
Wonder experience as usual with Wei and the team. This time was a 2 year follow-up / update session. Very much enjoyed the relaxed consultative and iterative process and it’s also fun and informative at the same time. I was pleasantly surprised and the nature of the changes made we landed on having the improvement it did and I’m now trying it out - so far so good. Highly recommend Foundation Bike Fit for their knowledge and approach and super having Frequency Cycleworks in the same facility.
Sebastian Joo
09:04 06 Jun 24
Excellent session with Matt to dial in my new TT Bike. The session not only did it include the fitting but also a very knowledgeable and interactive discussion on the "why" which I thought it is very useful to have more perception of feelings in the bike.
Thomas Young
19:02 05 Jun 24
Lovely blokes. Great service – going beyond the fit. Rding much better already. Definitely recommend.
Peter Hicks
10:58 05 Jun 24
Can highly recommend Foundation Fit. Super knowledgeable and nice people. Great to get a dialled in fit learn a bit about how your body fits to a bike, and what might be causing any potential issues. I went for a "pre-purchase fit" where they were able to recommend be a bike based on fit and my own budget.
Sam Mayo
08:36 04 Jun 24
Great experience, Matt has been super helpful, would highly recommend!
Thomas Turner
07:17 01 Jun 24
Extremely professional and friendly service. I would highly recommend Foundation Bike Fit to anyone who wants to improve their cycling experience.
Nick Blair
13:02 26 May 24
I had a fantastic experience with Foundation Fit!Wei and the team have such deep knowledge in their space and were able were able to communicate it thoroughly. I came for a saddle fitting session - Wei diligently inspected my position and then we explored the range of saddles, and honed into the one that felt best. I left with a much greater awareness of my fit, as well as feeling much more comfortable on the bike.I only regret not going to see them sooner - highly recommend!
TangyCheesecake
15:56 25 May 24
Detailed and comprehensive bike fitting. Spent time understanding my cycling needs, detailed analysis of current t set up and spent 2 hours tweaking the set up. Very happy with the outcome, was noticing a little pain in my left hip before and now no pain.
Rachel Stacy
09:52 22 May 24
So much more than just a saddle fit, Mat really went into body biomechanics and potential improvements to the riding position as a whole (cleat position, stack height etc.)Got my current setup mirrored on their bike rig and then had my position optimised whilst riding - it really helped feeling how every change impacted how riding felt. Once getting to a point that we felt was a good setup on the rig, it was a real shock to get back on my bike and feel how much less comfortable it was.Finding a good saddle has previously been a bit of a trial and error nightmare, but was made really simple by Mat's knowledge and advice. I think the first saddle I tried was the winner, but was great to be able to rule out a lot of others.Also enjoyed being able to test outside on the velo park.Thank you!
Nici A-G
19:39 20 May 24
Very comprehensive bike fit that took account of on and off the bike strength and movement. Only small changes needed, but I can already feel the extra power output and comfort as a result. Great to have the opportunity to go back if any tweaks needed. Many thanks to Wei!
Maxime Rousseff
10:20 20 May 24
I can only recommend Wei and Matthew for their services. I came meeting Wei and Matthew knowing very little about bikes and ended up being impressed by their professionalism and their help on the fit and after the fit. I am also one of those customers that bought the wrong bike for me and ended up swapping my bike for another one. Matt and Wei went above and beyond to find me a new bike and adjust it to my size which I really appreciated. Since the fit (Nov-23), my power output has increased, my recovery is better, and I just feel more confident on the bike. I just finished my first 70.3 Triathlon under 6h with a personal record on the cycling bit at 2h50... So thank you Matthew and Wei for making me faster on the bike and for the top notch services over the last few months.
Alex Legg

Jeremy Elliott
