Wei was very knowledge and friendly during the bike fit. It's left me with a better bike fit but also a better understanding of my sources of discomfort and how the adjustments made aim to reduce that pain.One of the few places that also allow you to try on different bike shoes which is a big plus.Thanks Wei!
Michael Wood
20:07 16 May 24
Wei provided a fantastic shoe fit. The shop was brilliant and the staff were very welcoming and accommodating. Wei worked specifically to my needs and riding style - Wei was highly knowledgeable and professional. Entirely satisfied and happy customer, cheers.
Al Windsor
12:22 15 May 24
Outstanding as always. One or two changes to my set up and fitting of a new saddle has just transformed my comfort and riding. Thank you !!
Nialla Gough
13:58 13 May 24
If there were more than 5 stars I would give them that. I had a great experience with Matt, Wei and Ev. Easy location to get to with all the facilities to try things out with flexible times fitting around work hours. I mainly run so preparing for the Ride100 they gave me so much helpful, reliable advice and guided me with gear suggestions and other people to check out. I feel so much more confident and prepared for the ride now.Starting with a standard bike fit Matt took the time to help me with all my questions, let me test out a new saddle and optimised my position on the bike to make sure I'm comfortable for the hours ahead of me. Mentioning that I also wanted to get some cleats he provided great suggestions for where to go and which ones to buy, which came in very useful when the shop assistant couldn't advise me.Wei then fitted the cleats and made sure my position was still ideal, checking that the cleats hadn't changed anything. He also spotted the nuanced detail with my pedalling form which explains some long term niggles I've been having!Finally Ev did a great job doing a light service on my bike. My gears are working super smooth now.Thank you to the team, this novice really appreciates all your support.
Sophie Cuve
14:31 10 May 24
Between theory, practice and laughts my Bikefit Decoded session in march was a great experience. I've learned a lot. Love their method! Wei and Mat are both great teachers, very professional, clear and with a nice touch of humor also. So it makes really feel you free to ask any question about bike fitting! Thanks a lot
Roger Beeley
13:42 07 May 24
The best money I have spent recently by far! I have been looking at buying a new bike for nearly a year now and have looked at new, used and everything in between. After having my fit this weekend, I am so glad I did it this way round first, nearly everything I had my eye on, although fully loaded was simply the wrong set-up and I would have been spending £000's on the wrong bike. The experience was also enjoyable, like having a cuppa midway through your bike ride, chatted through everything in detail with Wei to start with, and great to have all medical/injury considerations also factored in. Nothing felt rushed, 4 hours flew by and I have now received a great report, geometry spec/layout to ensure I get the right bike, several possible bike suggestions also included to fit differing budgets and with continued support to ensure the new purchase is correct. Thanks gents, look forward to seeing you again.
Derek Sheridan
20:13 06 May 24
I’ve been racing long course triathlon for about 5 years but I’ve been riding bikes for much longer. The performance fit at Foundation Bike Fit is by far the most thorough process I have been through. I have finally found my position for long distance races. Everything down to the smallest detail is covered, explained, tested (on the jig) then implemented. The 4 hours flies past, the chat with the team is super interesting and engaging throughout. They have a load of experience and it shows. Really comfortable environment in the belly of the Velodrome, which is very cool! Highly recommended.
Billy Cliffen
09:53 26 Apr 24
I really enjoyed the experience of my bike fit. Matt and Wei are such nice guys and take their job very serisouly, which makes for a fantasitc experience. Really recommend this if you're ordering a new bike and want to get the right size and set-up. I also learnt a lot about my body, how to improve my position, my bike shoes which has improved my cycle experience a lot. A great investment and experience.
Peter Jay
12:41 20 Apr 24
I had a bike fit with Mat yesterday and I would thoroughly recommend it to anyone considering it. Mat was really friendly and walked me through the whole thing so that I could understand each of the steps he was taking, and I came out of the bike fit with a lot more knowledge as well as much better fitting bike! The fit also included a folder full of the pictures and videos taken through the process, which are really useful to see the effect of the changes made.
Alex D.
18:11 19 Apr 24
Having recently experienced a bike fitting session with Matthew Walton at Bike Fit Foundation, I am thoroughly impressed and highly recommend his services. Matthew’s expertise and attention to detail were evident throughout the session. He not only adjusted my bike to perfectly suit my body but also provided comprehensive resources, including a detailed report and video analysis, which have been invaluable.Matthew’s approach is patient and informative, ensuring that I understood each adjustment and its purpose. His follow-up advice was also incredibly helpful, emphasizing a gradual adaptation to the new setup with practical tips on managing effort levels. His dedication to client satisfaction and comfort is remarkable, making him a true professional in the field of bike fitting.If you’re looking for a bike fit that truly understands rider biomechanics and aims to enhance your cycling performance and comfort, Matthew Walton is your go-to expert.
B T
13:23 19 Apr 24
Maz Ahmad
13:16 18 Apr 24
Absolutely awesome service.Recommended by Maj from H&K Cycle club.Spoke to Wei who walked me through the options.I was suffering from severe back pain following a change of bike, so I opted for the 4 hour injury prevention bike fit, 4 hours flew by.Apart from the copious coffee, snacks and drinks and free parking… the actual time with Mat and the team was awesome.Started with checking my position on the bike, then looking at my height, my feet, their length and how I squat and what good looks like on the bike. Mat then took video of me before moving me onto the Rig which is so worth it, connected to Zwift you can see I real time the changes you make to position and the impact on power.We elected to raise my handle bars, change my seat and crank… 4 months later I am cracking out centuries with ease, from Jan 29th to 31st I rode 3 centuries back to back I Saudi Arabia, competing 5 centuries that month.This week I had my follow up fit and had my cleat positions adjusted for my new shoes and bike.If you are serious about cycling pain free long term this is a must. The price is excellent value for money.
Sheona
13:29 10 Apr 24
This is the second time I've used Wei for a bike fit and I can highly recommend. Never felt like I was being upsold parts, there's an extensive saddle collection to try out and the overall service is excellent. Plus Wei is lovely 🙂
R Edwards
15:44 07 Apr 24
They take great care to get the best fit. It really does need two hours and feels a lot like going to the optician. No knee pain since.
Dimitri Gomiero
10:43 04 Apr 24
The experience with Mat was awesome, super insightful. The main things I came out with are a bike that feels amazing and the consciousness of how a bike should feel (as a beginner cyclist I didn’t know what was supposed to feel right or wrong). Super recommended, totally worth the cost, I think especially for beginner cyclists.
Bram Van Roey
21:32 02 Apr 24
Great experience. I learned a lot more than I thought I would. Wei is a kind, calm and knowledgeable professional.
Barbara Faissola
12:48 02 Apr 24
Super efficient, highly knowledgeable and professional team at Foundation bike fit. I had 2 bikes fitted and no longer have back and knee pain ! ….and of course , I’m very comfortable with my new bike position. Barbara
Marcell Kovács
11:54 31 Mar 24
Andrew Ellis
17:06 27 Mar 24
Extremely thorough, great fit experience, would recommend... value for money even though not cheap
Karen Thomas
18:39 25 Mar 24
I had a great bike fit and really learned a lot from the process. The team were really patient in explaining the process and it was actually a fun session. I came away with even more information than I expected (I learned a lot about my own body!), along with a new saddle which is a massive relief from the discomfort I was feeling! Excellent service and I’d totally recommend getting a bike fit with these amazing guys!
Peter Tamayo
20:31 21 Mar 24
Amazing bike fit. Superb knowledge about posture for endurance or power. Wei and the team were very accommodating to all queries. Would definitely recommend them! Kudos!
David
18:51 21 Mar 24
great attention to detail, interested in my "feel" as well as Wei's intuition-open to suggestion but also guided me when I was way off! Overall, really impressed
Lowell
20:03 17 Mar 24
A visit to Foundation Bike Fit (FBF) made all the difference.Even though FBF came highly recommended by a friend and cycling teammate, I made every excuse to delay taking the plunge. Particularly because my previous experience of a bike fit through a well-known brand didn’t make much of a difference. I left still having to do a lot guesswork and it wasn’t working. I realised that I needed professional bike help and finally made a booking. I wanted to stop guessing and get things right.Thankfully, Wei at FBF made the bike fit simple to understand. He asked all the right questions; tweaked a little; tested; tweaked again and tested, until we got close to perfect fit as possible. It sounds easy, and it is, when you’ve got someone who knows what they’re doing to help you get there.My cycling is now at another level. So much so, I feel positively different. My body feels better on the bike – something I didn’t think was possible. This bike fit has made cycling more comfortable, less of an effort and set to help me enjoy riding my bike for years to come. Thank you, Wei and FBF!
Joey Friedman
18:18 16 Mar 24
I had a two-part “fit before you buy” with Mat at Foundation, and I couldn’t recommend the service more. Buy a new bike with peace of mind by having a pre-purchase fit, after which Mat will mock up a CAD design and suggest bikes that work with your unique body geometry, and then a follow-up session once you have the new bike. Mat and Wei’s passion for this stuff is palpable—who else has a bike-fit podcast! Thanks guys.
David Black
11:11 08 Mar 24
As an enthusiastic, but definitely not pro, 46 year old cyclist I had put off getting a bike fit until I finally figured I needed to start looking after myself. The whole process was really enjoyable and Mat was a great and very patient guide! I have come away from it with a ton of insight and really practical information. For me it meant some adjustments to cleats, saddle height etc new handle bars and some insoles. No pressure to buy anything, just good advice and the revelation that I need to work on my posture on the bike as much as anything else! I’d happily book a follow up session in a month or two to see where I’m at with adapting to the fit.
J Pretzel
16:02 06 Mar 24
Had a bike fit with Wei recently and really appreciated Wei's professionalism and enthusiasm. Wei helped me understand several aspects of the fit and how best to optimise my riding position ie: saddle adjustment, types of saddle and crank lengthI would happily recommend this to anyone who is interested in the nerdy numbers, intricacies of cycling or just looking to get more out of their riding.Cheers!
Christophe Delacroix
15:22 01 Mar 24
Superb experience. Super knowledgeable and a pleasure to talk to, and super happy with suggested changes
Volodymyr G
10:57 01 Mar 24
Amazing fully personalised experience, can't recommend more. Before you try, you'll never believe that moving the saddle and handlebar down by 1-2cm and swapping shoe insoles could improve your average speed by ~30%.
Lea
22:33 27 Feb 24
Defilingly the best money on my bike spent. Matt was great and spent a lot of time explaining and making sure I was happy. You get a great report and video's and photos for future use too. Highly recommended
Metod B
13:17 27 Feb 24
I've been in the cycling industry for many decades, but have only now "allowed" myself to start a new (bike) project build from the right end—starting with fitting-before-buying. Wei and Matt are encyclopedias of cycling, but more importantly gurus of bodies extending into bikes. Also, their saddle library and a variety of options one can have a go on, is eye watering... The number of saddles I tested, which I had never before been able to do so, is exciting... I'm looking forward to next steps in the process.
Nico
11:13 24 Feb 24
Excellent! Had a basic fit yesterday, and every aspect so far has been superb: from the website and booking system, pre-fit questionnaire and the fit itself of course. I'm now in the real world "testing" phase of the fit, so I might be still figuring stuff out as I get the miles in, but I left the studio feeling a lot more confident in my position and the changes we made.The atmosphere is very relaxed and friendly, Matt is thorough, great at communicating and really good at explaining every step in detail and asking the right questions to get you thinking and to get the feedback he needs from you. Really helpful to have high quality video to see the differences in real time as well.Nice to have the option to test a saddle by essentially purchasing it as a deposit, so you can bring it back and swap for something else if it turns out not working out for you. Also good to find out that returning for a fit, even if on a different bike is discounted — as I was already thinking of coming back with my road bike before we were even done.100% recommended. If you're on the fence: get off it and book in at Foundation, you won't regret it.
Simon Walker
14:07 23 Feb 24
Matt is extremely thorough and patiently goes through each aspect of the riding position providing plenty of tips on how to improve performance. The format balances science with sensibility - each change is checked to see what works. Its not cheap but understandably as there's a lot of time and tech involved, and the report sent following the fit is so useful, with CAD drawings showing measurements that can used to reset, and transposed to other bikes, recommendations (I have wide feet and struggle to find the right shoes) the ability to try out different saddles from 100's (golddust... if you've been riding on a saddle that doesn't suit your pelvis get this checked out to prevent future saddle soreness ) and tips for improving muscle strength and flexibility. Should have done this years ago. Highly recommend.
Charles Williams
13:40 15 Feb 24
Friendly. Knowledgeable. Authoritative. Helpful. Engaging. Definitely not intimidating. All round super worth it. Highly recommended!
Steven Hunt
11:29 13 Feb 24
An amazing experience! Some context….I went with my existing aero bike with 175mm cranks, 120mm stem and 40cm bar width. I’ve also got no residual injuries or had any significant concerns. I’m also planning to build a Climbing bike so I wanted some advice with that too…..3.5 hours later I left with a tonne of great info and small changes that have made a significant difference.1. Improved cleat position, now on 2% float cleats, more for my preferred riding goals2. Adjusted saddle position, now my feet stay parallel through the pedal stroke and I’m closer to the hoods, improved posture and arm position.3. 165mm crack lengths feel amazing!4. 42cm bars were my preference for my new bike with 110mm stem5. Some focus on strength and conditioning exercises based on my body typeLastly the simple equation is this….have these changes made much difference to the feel of riding, honestly, it’s transformed it to the extent that I’m now not considering a new bike. I feel I’m putting out more power for less effort.It’s the best investment you can make if you’re paying £2-3K or above for a bike IMHO
Nigel Aston
10:20 10 Feb 24
Really good and helpful experience. Actual process was well explained throughout and the final outcome was detailed and informative for the bike purchase hopefully to be made,
Shaun Pritchard
05:53 09 Feb 24
My experience was personal, honest and an excellent bike fit. Everything smallest detail was explained and all my questions were answered. The entire process was centred on me and getting the best from the fit.
James Knight
15:54 07 Feb 24
Overall brilliant experience at Foundation Fit. Having had saddle issues for a number of months, being able to try out several saddles was extremely useful to find a comfortable one, an option that I have struggled to find with other fitters. To top it off, Wei and Matt are very welcoming and friendly, and very clear in the feedback throughout the session. Highly recommend a visit for any level of Cyclist.
Elaine E
14:48 02 Feb 24
Unqualified five stars. Their service cannot be improved! Everything you read is true: this is money absolutely well spent, and this is for you--whether you're an expert rider or a novice. I'm a novice, and I can't wait to go back. I learned so much (so much), came away with a total bike fit shift, and have some clear next steps to improve my riding experience (comfort) and quality (stability and speed). I couldn't be more delighted. You will learn more about yourself, your body, your bike, and your riding experience than you can imagine. I promise.
Luke Goss
14:46 28 Jan 24
Just did my second fit with Foundation. The first was great and it was time to do another to build on what was already a strong platform. This time with Mat. He totally understood my explanation of where I thought there might be room for adjustment 5 years on and was able to explain the issues and solve them quickly. There and then. Went riding today and felt great, like my body could do more things. Hardly ever ride in the drops and today it was easy and I felt strong. All the body parts doing what they're meant to. A few adjustments made a big difference. And these were translated to my Tri bike. I also really enjoyed it. Great to have the chance to chat with people who know how important it is to feel right in the body, how it changes the experience and are as into it as me. Thanks 🙂👍👍👍
Korbs
13:29 21 Jan 24
2 Great bike fits which have been a massive improvement for my comfort and performance.
Richard Murphy
09:43 20 Jan 24
Wei and the team are knowledgeable and welcoming. Well worth booking in with them!
Paul Fuller
11:23 19 Jan 24
I really wish I'd done this two years earlier. From a couple of rides already my patellar tendonitis is not getting aggravated, my upper hamstring tightness is gone, no numbness you know where, and I'm in a more comfortable position in general.I went with the injury prevention fit, where Wei spent the entire 4 hours assessing what was causing my various niggles and tweaking my bike fit, patiently running thorough loads of different options & positions to see what works best.I came out with an adjusted saddle height, adjusted saddle angle, a better saddle with pressure relief, a new & longer stem, adjusted cleats and a break levers that are easier to reach.An added bonus was what I learned from this all, and Wei talking me through everything we were doing and why.
Cai Wang
10:27 11 Jan 24
I got my first ever bike fit with Wei and Matt a few months ago and have found such a massive improvement in comfort levels when riding my bike on my everyday commute as well as over longer distances. They are both exceptionally knowledgable and explained each step of the adjustment process in a clear, logical manner. They are also very lovely people! I'm incredibly grateful for their help and would highly recommend getting your bike fit done with Foundation Bike Fit!
Jon Klaff
11:13 02 Jan 24
It's always a pleasure to work with Wei. He makes you feel at ease in order to discover what is holding you back. There's no expectation that you're a top level athlete, but will look at what you're doing and what could make you better.Alongside this is a great way of helping you realise your goals. There's a reason people go back to him.
Benjamin Schleis
21:02 01 Jan 24
The guys at Foundation bike fit were to put it simply… Amazing! I am an older rider, with some ailments and I’m working to get myself back in shape for some long distance rides n 2024. From the beginning Mat made me feel right at home, listened to what I wanted to do, what was hurting etc and debunked some myths along the way. I left there with my bike adjusted, power increased ALOT, and better understanding of how certain tweaks to the bike can help or hurt my style of riding. The amount of data they give you is amazing and I would say everything they say on their website is 100% accurate. I am no Pro cyclist but boy did they made me feel like one. They are not their to up sell you things, which is what I appreciated the most, they simply want to get you comfortable on your bike to meet your goals. A+ service!
Mike Hickman
16:29 31 Dec 23
I went to see the team at Foundation Bike Fit as I’m having a Spoon Custom bike made and Wei was recommended as the best person to dial me in for a custom geometry bike.Firstly, the setting is so cool, I was a bit early so went to sit up in the velodrome and watch people whizz round. The studio itself is in the guts of the building, where all the athletes would’ve walked which really nice.I did my bike with Matt, who was really affable and welcoming. We had a really good chat about bikes and then onto bits about me before the fit itself.I had the new bike fit, and began with the bike fit details of my existing bike as a starting point before dialling myself into the new bike. It was great to feel listened to and to have my current situation taken into consideration.The fit was really detailed, trying a number of positions which really highlighted difference a small change could make.I can’t wait for the bike to come and then to go back to make sure I’m set up correctly!
Andrew Blanchflower
12:42 28 Dec 23
I’d never had a bike fit before, but as part of buying a bike I had a session at Foundation - had a two hour session with Wei in the Velopark (worth a visit in itself). He was helpful, informative, enthusiastic and positive, all of which helped me feel confident and look forward to the next few years cycling. Excellent!
Sebastian Reyes
10:33 26 Dec 23
Definitely recommend if you are racing, planning any long distance rides or are in any sort of pain on the bike. My session was with Mat , very friendly and knowledgeable person. I mainly came to get my bike set up as efficient as possible for Ironman. I also let Mat know the pain I was experiencing in my back and neck. Mat gave me a detailed explanation as to why I was in pain. He also gave me a lot of insight into triathlon racing. After a lot of bike tweaking we got the bike set up right and pedalling just felt so much easier. the next ride I did was pain free which is what I am most happy with
Yifan Zhao
08:16 11 Dec 23
Absolutely professional service! Helped me a a lot with the riding position. Recommended to every dedicated cyclist.
Thomas Flament
20:59 29 Nov 23
A bike fit at Foundation Bike Fit is a must for any person keen to improve significantly his/her riding experience and more generally take cycling to next level. I had a really enjoyable time with Matt for a Fit Before you Buy session, during which Matt will not only explain essentials of bike mechanics/racing but also how your body type/position impacts your overall performance on a bike and how minor mechanical adjustments can yield and unlock higher performance and comfort on the bike. Matt is super knowledgeable and really a bike genius. A MUST do in anticipation of any bike purchase or for any bike enthusiasts. The team also follows up with you after the session and gives you detailed feedback on the session and what are your needs. I could not be happier with their services.
Steven C
08:03 18 Nov 23
The team at Foundation (I worked with Mat specifically), are extremely knowledgeable about their craft and what it takes for your body and bike to work perfectly together. I’m a novice in this space and Mat made it so easy for me to understand and appreciate all the nuances of proper cycling and now what type of bike to buy. I highly recommend booking in a bike fit whether you’re a novice or a pro!
Martha Stojanov
15:59 16 Nov 23
Absolutely fantastic team, combining science and individual feedback to get to your right riding position. They also helped me do a cost benefit analysis of going all out today on a new shiny toy vs getting best bang for buck taking onto account my 2-3 year goals. I learned a few things too. The atmosphere is super relaxed yet professional and focused on the best outcome for the individual. The versatility in recommendation is great as they can give you feedback on triathlon, MTB, road at all levels. I am super pleased and for me it’s the best investment I have made on the path to acquiring my first outdoor road bike. They are brand agnostic and they truly care only about improving rider confidence, comfort and performance. Cannot recommend highly enough!
Irfan Khoda
13:54 16 Nov 23
I would high recommend the team and Foundation bike fit. Wei and his team went over and above to ensure I ordered the correct bike frame for me. They even spoke to the retailer on the changes required. Honestly, couldn't have asked for any more from them. Great team, super knowledgeable and friendly. Best in the Business.
Tadhg Fahey
13:17 16 Nov 23
I was expecting some useful information, but the experience surpassed my expectations and I not only got the measurements for the right bike fits, I also have much more of an understanding of how it all works.It's a very interactive experience and I asked many questions and they were all answered thoroughly. I was hesitant about getting a bike fit because of the price, but definitely did not regret it as I now also have the right info to get the ideal bike for me, now and in future dates. I'm now saving up for my first proper mountain bike, the orange clockwork evo 29er, and I'm now confident about the fit and the right posture when riding thanks to foundation bike fit.I'd highly recommend going with them as they are very friendly and of course very helpful and knowledgeable. Thanks for all the help help and support foundation bike fit.
Fraser Southey
15:25 10 Nov 23
I spent an amazing afternoon with Wei at FOUNDATION bike fit - discovering a great deal about my anatomy, physical qualities and irregularities - and their inter-relationship with my bike. Subtle adjustments were made, always with explanations as to why and only retained if they resulted in beneficial sensations on the treadmill bike. I enjoyed an immediately more comfortable ride home and the follow-up report covered everything from ideal bike geometries, optional components to fit to my present bike and links to exercises to help address my own 'human' machine.I would also add two further points: 1. Wei is a really great communicator and listener 2. The toasted vegan banana bread at the cafe two doors east from Cloud 9 (Where FOUNDATION is based) makes the visit doubly worthwhile. Yum.
jess Wright
19:57 31 Oct 23
Great service! Amazing before, during & after to help me pick a gravel bike. Couldn't reco enough!
Steve H
10:37 25 Oct 23
Foundation Bike Fit really impressed - wow. Incredibly professional and expert. Everything from the location to the service to the knowledge to the attention to detail. Outstanding and exceeded expectation. Matthew is really helpful and thorough and knowledgeable. Felt in very good hands and highly recommend this place - delivered a very strong sense of confidence. Really strong and robust! Really appreciate!!!
CKB Interiors
15:01 21 Oct 23
Thanks WeiGreat service highly recommend and appreciate all the advice, received full detailed report measurements and videos of before and after.Best regardsImran
Adam Wheelwright
13:41 17 Oct 23
Excellent overall experience - lots to unpack and learn but all covered really clearly and with great explanation of the ‘why’ behind the riders’ position on the bike.Ended up with a big difference between my starting point position and my new baseline but all feels great so far and have already enjoyed a big improvement in my chronic knee pain!Really looking forward to the follow up session in a few weeks time.Big thanks to Mat for making this a brilliant experience.
Luke Mills
11:47 15 Oct 23
I went in for a new bike fit and can't recommend Wei enough. He's incredibly passionate about what he does, professional and fun at the same time too. As we stepped through the process, Wei explained along the way why he was doing what he was doing. You'll come away with a much more comfortable (and pain free!!) position on the bike & an overall much better understanding of what to look for in a new bike. 100% recommend it, and worth every penny! Thanks again Wei, you rock.
Luca Longhi
15:07 11 Oct 23
If you're looking to improve your cycling experience, Foundation Fit in London is the place to be. Wei and Matt are exceptional – genuinely sincere and incredibly knowledgeable. I've visited twice already, and each time has been a fantastic experience. After the fitting process is complete, you have the opportunity to try out the bike at the Velopark, and I simply couldn't stop riding. The bike felt perfect. I couldn't stop smiling!
Jon C
14:00 07 Oct 23
I had a fit earlier in the year with Mat and Wei. Having had fits before, I kind of knew what to expect, though both these guys added even more on top of what I'd seen before. The attention to detail is spot on, the knowledge is top tier and the end result was a bike fit on my TT ride that felt perfect.
Alex Smith
10:02 06 Oct 23
For months I’ve been battling an on going knee injury once I hit about 80k on a bike, no amount of stretching, conditional work or yoga would seem to shift this issue… and then Mat re-position my cleats in the right spot for my body! Overnight success does happen, the next day I put a 114k ride down with a sprint finish with power I didn’t know I had! If you’re experiencing any issues or pains on the bike, I can almost guarantee foundation bike fit will be able to make a remarkable difference to your power; strength and experience on a bike! Plus, free bananas and ginger nut biscuits!
Ian Parsons
08:30 29 Sep 23
Mat went above and beyond during the bike fit to not only get me more comfortable on my bike, but to explain what and why changes were being made. I have had bike fits in the past... but foundation bike fit is worlds apart both in the understanding on the day and the information relayed in your fit report..Great people and a great service.. thanks again..
Ipek Ozel
15:25 26 Sep 23
Wei is very helpful and he explained everything clearly. It was very interesting and fun to see how small changes can make a big difference. I cycled from London to Amsterdam after our session and the bike felt very comfortable. Thanks so much Wei!
Cosimo Cherubini
13:58 22 Sep 23
Fantastic! no other words needed.The session started with me explaining the problems I was facing. Than Matt took some videos of me riding and show me to explain what I could have improved. Then we tested different settings (lower saddle, shorter handlebar, ecc.) till we found the optimal position. 100% worth the investment
Karim Foda
17:55 17 Sep 23
Absolutely amazing. My fitting and follow up was with Matt Walton and everything about the experience was great. I came in suffering from a lot of back pain whenever I got on my bike and within the space of 2 sessions that was completely removed. Highly recommend.
Charlotte Rihoy
13:29 08 Sep 23
I had a fit with Mat at Foundation Fit ahead of buying my first time trial bike. I was hugely impressed by how tailored the session was to my goals and how Mat was able to analyse the idiosyncrasies of my movements patterns in order to find my optimum position on the bike. The equipment Foundation Fit uses means that every element of your riding position can be adjusted during the fit. What is most impressive though is the depth of Mat’s knowledge and experience.Having seen the nuance that goes into finding the best riding position and how individual it is, I can’t imagine spending money on a bike without having a fit like this.I would strongly advise anyone planning to purchase a bike or experiencing discomfort while cycling to book a session with Foundation Fit. It is worth every penny.
Liam Vercetti
12:59 07 Sep 23
Fantastic experience, after having a terrible Fit at another shop in London I was apprehensive. However, Mat and Wei helped me understand the cause of my issues and solved them.
Ryan Moore
18:20 03 Sep 23
I had a bike fit with Mat in Aug 2023 for a newly purchased bike. Mat was very professional from start to finish; I learnt an awful lot and had fun along the way.Mat helped me understand some historic IT band issues, with recommondations on stretches and how the bike fit can help out with this specific issue. Also from the initial assessment, he was able to pin point other areas that weren't 'quite right'; not noticeable to me riding the bike but after some time on the saddle would (and has in the past) resulted in some discomfort. The before and after videos made this extremely obvious!A new stem length was recommended, with the saddle height and position altered to my specific needs. The bike feels considerably better after multiple long rides; difference for me has been very noticeable (positively of course). I had followed up with numerous questions via email post-fit and Mat responded with extremely detailed answers; clearly put a lot of thought into it and more than happy to share his knowledge - this was very much appreciated.Great experience, would 100% return to them, and recommend.
bob dynowski
12:56 01 Sep 23
On the recommendation of Brixton cycling club members i booked a bike fit with Matt. I had not quite expected how thorough and illuminating the 4 hours would be. Or just how many saddle choices would be offered. I definetly now know my own limitations physiologically, what to do to improve flexibility and the dreaded posterior chain (!). Matt has continued to engage with me over saddle and seat post lay back options to accomodate me and the bikes frame. Very highly recommended.
Simeon Pereira-Madder
12:04 01 Sep 23
Went to Foundation for a performance fit primarily to resolve issues I have with pain and discomfort, but also to see if I can get more aero and hold that position sustainably.I race track pretty much exclusively (Track League and Vets League at HHV and Full Gas Track League at LVV) so there's not much shifting of position or resting or changing gear to alleviate any of the litany of niggles that I've accumulated over the years (old calf injury, herniated disc, various arthritic joints, persistent cramp in feet, perineal pressure, etc). I'd attempted to 'correct' some of this myself and had a previous fit elsewhere too, but the discomforts remained.Wei and Matt went through a host of off-bike assessments and set up changes and arrived at a new position, new saddle and differently supported left foot which seems to have made quite a large difference for me (in terms of cramp and perineal pressure alleviation) so in a race scenario I am more comfortable and able to stay in an aggressive position putting out power rather than wriggling about trying to stop stuff hurting.I am now hunting around for the rather longer stem and shorter cranks we found worked to enable me to fully dial in the revised position but I'm excited to be able to race more comfortably even before these are sourced, having landed on two podiums over the weekend with the new set-up.I'd be happy to recommend Foundation to riders looking to ride more comfortably - even vets with pre-existing bodily stuff going on. Now I just need to find someone who makes affordable 155mm cranks and 180mm stems.Thanks guys!
Harry Guttridge
20:09 30 Aug 23
Fantastic bike fit by very knowledgeable guys. Would whole heartedly recommend!
Richard Oxford
11:16 23 Aug 23
I was made to feel at home from the moment I met Matthew. The basic bike fit was extremely thorough and I was asked all sorts of questions so Matthew could fully understand me and my body.I would recommend Foundation to anyone that wants to feel comfortable on their bike.
Chris Tackaberry
11:15 17 Aug 23
Amazing. I have been riding road bikes as fast as I can for over a decade. Despite that, the session with Mat was a revelation. If you are looking for "free watts" *and* a more comfortable ride, whatever kind of machine you ride, you will find both here. Not only that you will discover some fascinating insights about how you currently ride and how you could improve from people who are, I believe, world class experts in their field and extremely pleasant to work with to boot. In case you are wondering, I have not been paid or otherwise incentivised to write this. Its my honest opinion. I am just kicking myself I did not do this a few years ago. Thanks so much to Mat the team at Foundation Fit.
Oliver Jones
15:44 11 Aug 23
Amazing bike fitting experience with Matt from start to finish. Definitely recommend Foundation bike fit - great people, great location and so knowledgeable!
Nathan Harris
12:53 04 Aug 23
Really positive experience with Matt and Wei and would recommend a visit to these guys!I was originally on the fence before going due to the expense but those concerns quickly faded. I had purchased a new bike that was generally a good fit for me and the subtle changes and improvements both Wei and Matt managed to achieve was exceptional.I later purchased a smaller crank as per their suggestions and with minor tweaks on my free second follow up with them my riding experience has been revolutionised. Certainly no regrets!Additionally, what I loved about visiting Matt and Wei was their input and guidance focused on the body in parallel with the bike. Its human nature to blame your tools but they clearly articulated and demonstrated what I should be doing and improving as part of my general overall fitness and wellbeing that supports a better riding experience. Subtle but effective.Lastly, as with any bike fit experience there is the dreaded fear of having to purchase new components. I never felt pressured into buying anything but they actually helped me achieve the absolute maximum out of my current bike. What helped was experiencing the ideal setup on the test rig vs my bike with tweaks. Matt and Wei providing guidance on how to take it forward which was later fully tweaked as part of my second free follow up. I am now short crank convert!!All in all, highly recommended, go see these guys, they know their stuff and equally really lovely. Its also in the vellodrome, what more do you need 🙂
Benjamin Beer
09:12 04 Aug 23
I came to Foundation as I had a bike fit before and it didn't really work for me.The first 4 hour session with Matt went through everything including my sports history, injuries and goals I want to achieve on the bike. Make not mistake: That session was tough and I was put through my paces which I thought was great!We went through lots of different set ups and realised I needed shorter cranks which I had duly installed afterwards.The location is great at the iconic Olympic Velodrome and you can test out your bike fit straight away on the outdoor cycling track. Perfect!I recently went back for my follow up appointment and we made some more tweaks to the bike set up and now I've never felt more comfortable on my road bike.Highly recommended!
Owen Jeffs
09:31 28 Jul 23
Had my first Bike Fit with Foundation a few weeks ago. I do mainly endurance road riding and I was skeptical as to whether a bike fit was necessary after having watched many YouTube videos on the subject. I can definitely say that I had a very noticeable increase in comfort on the bike after the fit when I tried it out for a few laps on the track outside (included in the bike fit). Very useful to see videos of before and after adjustments on the bike and to discuss everything. Good experience all round and includes a follow up session within 3months 👍🏻👍🏻
Sarah Buitelaar
20:45 25 Jul 23
Honestly this is so much more than I expected or could have imagined. I had my bike fit with Mat after meeting Wei at the velo on they’re open day, I had put this off for some time as I felt too beginner and almost embarrassed by my lack of knowledge however I was made to feel at complete ease, given an amazing amount information which mat made simple for me to understand and over all left feeling so much more confident as well as excited to now continue my biking journey. Mat has a lot of passion and patience which I am truly greatful for. I really can’t recommend this company enough, they are absolutely amazing!
Renz 2.0
08:55 19 Jul 23
I've had bike fittings before but this is really what I was looking for: they measure everything, and then systematically explore minor adjustments to what feels right in order to zero in on what is optimal.Mat led my session and was crystal clear in assessing my position on the bike (and off it) and explaining my options.I'm not a Tour pro or even a competitive amateur, just someone who wants to extract maximum comfort and efficiency from his bike when riding.I came away knowing there's a set of measurements, crank lengths, seat types and bikes that will work well for me.Now all I have to do is choose my new machine! I feel a lot better doing it this way than buying something I like the look of then hoping it fits. Tried that.Well done Mat and the Foundation team for providing such excellent and valuable support.
Seun Alaba
16:56 17 Jul 23
Super friendly and professional job by Wei and Matt getting me prepared for my first ultra distance race which I successfully completed with thanks to them. Originally have had several fit issues related to hips, shoulders and other issues which have been either completely solved or alleviated with a new bike fit. Super knowledgeable and willing to help out in as many ways possible for you to meet your goals!
Jason Lin
23:39 30 Jun 23
The Performance bike fit with Wei was a fantastic experience. I learnt a lot about how my physiological state (flexibility) is affecting my bike position. Wei took a very careful assessment of both my on the bike and off bike movement before making helpful recommendations on both changes to the bike and off bike flexibility exercises.Overall an excellent and detailed bike fitting, I really see the difference after the fit and keen to see how it plays out in the longer term!And bonus point: you get to test out any changes on the road circuit, not just on a stationary trainer!
Oliver Cardigan
14:15 29 Jun 23
If you are half serious about cycling then a bike fitting is arguably as important as your bike. Foundation Bike Fit are absolute masters at it. Spending a few hours with Wei and Matt at the stunning Olympic velopark is a hugely enjoyable experience as they’ll make dozens and dozens of adjustments and measurements whilst sharing many anecdotes and insights about cycling and triathlon. Most importantly it will also leave you considerably more comfortable on your bike - but also much faster. You’ll never regret the cost once you’ve experienced it. They are that good.
Jade L
18:30 25 Jun 23
I've had the pleasure of having an ongoing bike fitting service from Wei and Mat at Foundation Fit since November 2022.My first visit was to determine my ideal geometry for a custom built bike geared towards ultra distance riding. Additionally, my existing second hand and ill-fitting bike was tuned as close as possible to my body to eliminate existing aches such as left knee pain, and saddle sores. Foundation Fit use top of the range equipment and both Mat and Wei explain their process in a very clear and informative way. You are made to feel very comfortable and part of the process.As mentioned, I had saddle sore issues and I was given a saddle to trial for a couple weeks from their extensive saddle library. Initially, Wei picked out two he thought would work well with my body. I tested these out on the trainer and opted to try one of these - It was amazing to have found a saddle just like that. After the trial, Wei fitted a brand new one on my bike and my custom build also has the same saddle.I was free to ask Wei any questions over email and every reply was comprehensive and helpful. Wei ultimately helped me with my cleat position that solved my knee issue and answered any worries I had about potentially fitting aerobars.My second fit was for the custom bike, which I had with Mat. Equally amazing, Mat helped me shift my weight to the back of the bike so I could relieve pressure off of my hands and upper body.A bike fit report is generated for me where I can reference all the measurements and notes made during a fitting. This also includes numerous photos and videos that show my riding position, foot stability, and left right balance.Overall, I would highly recommend Foundation Fit for their professional and thorough service. Mat and Wei are exceptionally friendly and personable and give you honest advice and feedback.
Family Account
11:31 08 Jun 23
Wei and Matt are the Jedi's of bike fitting! I came in for an initial fit, they made subtle improvements in my position that increased my power output with same or increased comfort on long rides. I then came back for advice when shopping for a new bike which was very helpful. They are super knowledgeable, thorough, responsive, and their studio in the Velodrome has everything needed. Highly recommended!
Benjamin Hie
10:20 07 Feb 23
Had two bike fits with Matt who was very attentive and knowledgeable.Besides improving the overall fit to be more comfortable some micro cleat adjustments had me putting down more power on the ride home.Nice win win.Highly recommend.*edit*Did the RideLondon 100 and next day only I felt mild DOMS (muscle aches). No real pain or soreness like I had the previous year.The first time doing 100 miles I was almost crippled on the ride home and this time round the ride was almost easy...Thanks again!
Tanja Veselinovic
17:22 05 Feb 23
I got recommended by my cycling coach, to do my FIRST bike fit. I would highly recommend them!They are very good, they analysis everything and at the end, they send you a bike report of your fit, which had everything written down and had their recommendations.I found out the cycling shoes ( my old ones) were too small for me, as they measured my food length and width. At the end recommended me what shoe brands would suit me and my new pair are AMAZING.The follow up appointment was very good, as they made some adjustments which helped my riding posture and made me more comfortable when riding my bike.Thanks to them, I feel more connected with my bike when I am riding outdoors and on Zwift.Definitely worth every penny spent.My favourite part was that the bike rig had my exact measurements and after trying and trying loads of different saddles, I found the one for me!
wai lee
12:14 01 Feb 23
My third bike fit, after changing bikes. I was unfit and felt I needed to change my position, but after careful adjustments, Wei only moved things a bit. The following weekend went for a 95km ride and wow the difference was amazing! Again thank you Wei! Amazing job!
Andy Wingate
17:34 29 Jan 23
My wife bought me a bike fit before spending a load of money on a new bike and it was brilliant.Matt is really friendly, knowledgeable and wasn't at all worried that I am not the world's greatest time triallist nor the most flexible person. The fit was incredibly comprehensive and he explains every element, so you aren't left confused at the what is going on. You leave with a world of photos, videos, exercises to do to improve your flexibility, things to watch out for and a few bikes which would fit my geometry needs.Would definitely recommend this for anyone looking at their first big bike purchase
David
16:03 30 Aug 22
This was my first bike fitting. Mat and Wei are friendly, super informative and gave me some great recommendations. The bike fitting process was comfortable. Had my first ride over the weekend and felt comfortable and stronger on my bike. I like it that there is a follow up session included which can help if I need something small adjusted. Overall, really happy with the service and would recommend them.
carla benton
14:24 01 Aug 22
The best bike fit I've ever had - for a custom bike build. From start to finish Wei, and later Wei and his team, were incredibly kind, friendly, supportive and helpful. Best of all, Wei is incredibly knowledgeable and it is clear he really wants the best for his customers. He is happy to share this knowledge, which he does in an accessible way, and there were never any points when I felt patronised or like I had asked a silly question. Wei made me feel comfortable and put me at ease and I felt a real part of the bike fit - it felt like we were working together to figure things out and he always listened to the feedback I gave with any positions we tried. He made suggestions and was always keen to hear how I felt about positioning etc. I felt like I was in safe hands during both my first fit and refit to check everything over, and Wei went above and beyond for me try and figure out what was causing specific issues on my bike. He was also always available outside of the bike fit appointments for questions I had. Overall, I would 100% recommend using Foundation for a bike fit and I really appreciate all of his help and support in creating an amazing, comfortable ride. Thanks so much Wei and team!
Ziyu Zheng
10:59 24 Jun 22
I found foundation bike fit by random online searching but encouraged to book a session by word of mouth- a really fast amateur racer who has been benefitted from Wei’s expertise for over 6 years strongly recommended him in the group chat.Had a full performance fit session on my Triathlon bike with Wei and Matt. In addition to numbers and graphs, Wei focused more on how I actually felt; instead of discrete positions, Wei investigated the kinematics and took care to improve my stability and pedaling fluency. There always exists factors that aren’t trivially measurable, in which case more humane approaches shine as expertise.I have been out riding for several times after the session to really let the new pose sink in. I actually had doubts on the saddle height during the session (it felt too low), but the new setting turned out to be a big performance boost: better force exertion and hence power transfer over a larger section of each revolution, higher stability at high cadence, and for the first time I actually feel my core is engaged in each pedal stroke- much more powerful, feels amazing. Also, the higher, more upward tilted, and more widely spaced areo bar gives me a bigger room to breath while reliving my neck and shoulder pain. I almost feel like sleeping in the aero position, no kidding.Oh and Wei wrote me a detailed report that includes all the measurements, ends and goals of each adjustment, off-bike work details and stuff, with all photos and videos attached.
Murat Demircan Gemini Group
13:22 13 Apr 22
Perfect fitting experience.. Thank you so much Wei !!Cycling for 5 hours without any pain (except leg muscles 🙂 or num feeling is so exciting. I wish I met Wei before.Also thank you for all the valuable guidance and information while choosing a new bike.
Vivan Kumar
10:54 29 Jan 22
I cannot recommend Wei enough. I've had two bike fits with him so far and on both occasions, I've come out of it with a positive feeling.Wei is extremely knowledgeable, understanding and just an overall great person who is ready to talk to you about anything and everything bike fit related.He took into account all of my concerns, issues, riding goals and adapted my fit, while explaining the changes in detail each time to make sure I understood them. I have a much better understanding of what sort of bike I need, the setup I'll be most comfortable in and the equipment surrounding it.The detailed report at the end of the fit really makes it easy to understand every aspect of the change and contains all the measurements that I can use to setup my bike.All in all, Wei is one of the best in the business, and I'd recommend him highly.
